prs.title: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
## Universal Tuya Zigbee тАФ GitHub Activity Summary for #140352

### ЁЯФН Issues (2)

| # | Status | FP | Notes |
|---|--------|----|-------|
| **#316** | тЬЕ Closed | `_TZ3000_fllyghyj` (TS0201) | Climate sensor misidentified тАФ FP already exists in `climate_sensor` driver. User needed re-pair after v5.11.25+ update. |
| **#1395** | ЁЯЯб Open | `_TZ3000_hyarhbyx` (TS0001) | 1-gang Zigbee switch request by @Kennybarroz. Standard on/off тАФ maps to `switch_1gang`. Needs FP addition + driver assignment. |

### ЁЯУЛ Open PRs тАФ FPs Pending Integration (6 PRs, 8 new FPs)

| PR | Author | FP(s) | Target Driver | Status |
|----|--------|-------|---------------|--------|
| **#1372** | oskarirauta | `_TZE200_mgxy2d9f` | `motion_sensor` | Open |
| **#1350** | PiTRiS87 | `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab` | `thermostat` (TS110E series) | Open |
| **#1166** | chernals | `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n` (TS0202 PIR) | `motion_sensor` | Closed (unmerged) тАФ needs re-evaluation against current `HybridSensorBase` passive DP listener |
| **#1253** | Peter-Celica | `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` | `valve_irrigation` / TBD | Open тАФ `_TZE200_pay2byax` already tracked in USER_DEVICE_EXPECTATIONS.md as fixed for `valve_irrigation` (GH#135) |
| **#1219** | Melectro1 | `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` | TBD тАФ needs interview | Open |
| **#1218** | Melectro1 | `_TZE204_dapwryy7` | TBD тАФ needs interview | Open |

### тЬЕ Already Supported (no action needed)
- `_TZ3000_fllyghyj` тЖТ `climate_sensor` driver (issue #316 confirmed existing)
- `_TZE200_pay2byax` тЖТ `valve_irrigation` (fixed in v5.12.0 per USER_DEVICE_EXPECTATIONS.md)

### ЁЯФз Action Items
1. **Merge candidates**: PRs #1372, #1350, #1253 contain valid new FPs тАФ verify against current driver fingerprints DB (`DeviceFingerprintDB.js`) to avoid collisions before merging.
2. **Needs device interview**: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`, `_TZE204_dapwryy7`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` тАФ request ZCL interview dumps from users via `tools.developer.homey.app/tools/zigbee`.
3. **Re-evaluate #1166**: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n` (TS0202 PIR) тАФ with the passive DP listener (v5.11.170+), TS0202 devices should now auto-enroll without explicit cluster probing. Confirm if this FP is already covered by existing `motion_sensor` fingerprints.
4. **#1395**: Add `_TZ3000_hyarhbyx` to `switch_1gang` driver тАФ straightforward TS0001 mapping.

### тЪая╕П Notes
- All PRs originate from `JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee` fork тАФ standard upstream merge workflow applies.
- No new **fork-specific fingerprints** requiring separate driver entries detected тАФ all map to existing driver categories.
- Recommend closing #1166 and #1253 as duplicates if their FPs are already present in the DB post-v5.12.0.
